subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Feb 1st, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 1st, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is a great, black fortress built directly into the wall of a massive cavern in the Underdark.
source_quote: a great, black fortress has been built into the wall of the cave

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The outpost is constructed of polished, worked obsidian stone.
source_quote: polished obsidian of Black Ember Outpost was built directly into the cave wall

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The only true entrance to the outpost is a set of obsidian double doors.
source_quote: A set of obsidian double doors appear to be the only true entrance into Black Ember Outpost

subject: Great Hall
fact: The Great Hall is a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long inside the outpost.
source_quote: a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: A Fire Giant sergeant is drilling troops in the Great Hall.
source_quote: A Fire Giant sergeant attempting to drill his ogre troops

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: The Fire Giant sergeant is frustrated with his troops.
source_quote: The Fire Giant is frustrated

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur proposed using mage hand to remove the ogres' uniforms.
source_quote: Felkur proposes using mage hand to remove the ogres clothes

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur proposed using a recording of female hell hounds to distract the male hell hounds.
source_quote: Felkur proposes to use a recording of female hell hounds to distract the male hell hounds

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast mage hand to attempt to remove the ogres' clothes.
source_quote: Felkur casts mage hand, and attempts to remove the ogres clothes

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rolled a natural 20 on sleight of hand, causing the ogres not to notice the magical hand.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural 20 sleight of hand and the Ogres don't notice the disembodied magical hand

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rolled an 18 on sleight of hand, causing one ogre's uniform to fall off.
source_quote: Felkur then rolls an 18, and the uniform of one of the ogres falls off

subject: Daein
fact: Daein reproduced the sound of female hell hounds for Felkur's illusion.
source_quote: And Daein reproduces it for Felkur's illusion

subject: Daein
fact: Daein created an auditory illusion of a female hell hound.
source_quote: Daein created the illusion of a female hell hound

subject: Daein
fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with uncanny precision.
source_quote: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with uncanny precision

subject: Daein
fact: Daein's illusion included the remark that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow.
source_quote: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim waded into battle against the enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim waded into battle

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lost his concentration after being struck by an ogre.
source_quote: Bramgrim losing his concentration after being struck by an ogre

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim acted disappointed by Daein's inability to hit a Fire Giant with a sword.
source_quote: Bramgrim acting disappointed from Daein's inability to hit a Fire Giant with a sword

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim abandoned his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic.
source_quote: shamed Bramgrim into abandoning his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres.
source_quote: the Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres

subject: ogres
fact: The ogres were wearing ill-fitting uniforms that were poorly made and barely held together.
source_quote: ogres wearing weird uniforms and hell hounds

subject: ogres
fact: The ogres did not look happy or obedient.
source_quote: The ogres do not look happy or obedient

subject: ogres
fact: The ogres were frustrated and hungry.
source_quote: The ogres are frustrated and hungry

subject: hell hounds
fact: The hell hounds looked bored during the drill.
source_quote: The hell hounds look bored

subject: hell hounds
fact: The hell hounds were more disciplined and sat at attention.
source_quote: The hell hounds are more disciplined and sit at attention

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: A single fire giant was drilling two ogres and three hell hounds.
source_quote: A single fire giant is drilling two ogres and three hell hounds

subject: hell hounds
fact: The party observed three hell hounds being drilled.
source_quote: drill a squad of miserable ogres and bored hell hounds

subject: ogres
fact: The party observed two ogres being drilled.
source_quote: drill a squad of miserable ogres and bored hell hounds

subject: uniform removal
fact: Felkur used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms.
source_quote: Felkur had used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms

subject: ambush start
fact: The ambush began in earnest.
source_quote: When the ambush began in earnest

subject: illusion of victory
fact: Daein convinced anyone listening that the giants had won the battle.
source_quote: convincing anyone listening that the giants had won the battle

subject: kennel passage
fact: The party navigated past a kennel reeking of burned hair.
source_quote: navigating past a kennel reeking of burned hair

subject: storeroom approach
fact: The party reached a storeroom where more ogres hauled water from a well.
source_quote: reached a storeroom where more ogres hauled water from a well

subject: well identification
fact: Bramgrim recognized the well as the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: Recognizing this well as the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: silence spell
fact: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent any alarms.
source_quote: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent any alarms

subject: second fight
fact: The ensuing fight in the storeroom was brutal.
source_quote: The ensuing fight was brutal

subject: Daein injured
fact: The fire giant landed a bone-crushing blow on Daein.
source_quote: the fire giant landing a bone-crushing blow on Daein

subject: Daein counterattack
fact: Daein killed an ogre.
source_quote: Daein responded with relentless fury, killing an ogre

subject: Daein counterattack
fact: Daein struck the giant twice.
source_quote: striking the giant twice

subject: Daein gesture
fact: Daein winked at the cleric.
source_quote: winking at the cleric

subject: fire giant death
fact: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant.
source_quote: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant

subject: room secured
fact: The room was secured.
source_quote: the room was secured

subject: human prisoner
fact: A human prisoner is held at the outpost and was noted as particularly beautiful.
source_quote: the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The well in the storeroom is the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: entrance to the Path of Shadows
